example: He had to abandon the mission midway.
The pain began to abate after treatment.

meaning_en: To give up power or responsibility

example: The error was an aberration in the data.
You must abide by the rules.
His life was one of abnegation.
The traitor was banished from the kingdom.
The barbaric act shocked the nation.
The land remained barren for years.
The bashful child hid behind his mother.
The benevolent king helped the poor.
He went berserk after the loss.
Rain was a boon to farmers.
The challenge did not daunt her.
The event turned into a debacle.
This is one facet of issue.
No one could gainsay the facts.
The speech was full of hackneyed phrases.
The work was done in a haphazard manner.

meaning_en: A long aggressive speech or scolding
example: The officer harangued the recruits endlessly.

meaning_en: A sign of something to come
example: Dark clouds are harbingers of rain.
Hardy soldiers survived the difficult terrain.
It was a harrowing experience for survivors.
The judge gave a harsh sentence.
She hastened to complete her work.
The storm wreaked havoc on the city.
You must heed the advice given.
He was heedless of the warning signs.
One nation sought hegemony over the region.
The heinous crime shocked the nation.
Speaking against the king was considered heresy.
He was declared a heretic by the clergy.
The firefighter made a heroic rescue.

meaning_en: Slow to act due to doubt
example: She was hesitant to speak up in public.
The military follows a strict hierarchy.
Lack of funds was a major hindrance.
His histrionic reaction seemed completely fake.
The fire alarm turned out to be a hoax.
They paid homage to fallen soldiers.

meaning_en: Of the same kind or nature
example: The group was homogeneous in background.
The village people were very hospitable.
His hubris ultimately led to his downfall.
Humane treatment of prisoners is essential.
Saying I could eat a horse is hyperbole.

meaning_en: One who pretends virtues they lack
example: The hypocrite preached honesty but lied daily.
Her voice hypnotized the entire crowd.
This is a hypothetical scenario only.
He felt jaded after routine work.
She has keen interest in science.
Truth is the kernel of story.
